rules.title: Establish Basic Information Security Management
rules.description: You need to establish a basic framework for information security management. Start with documenting your information security policy and defining clear roles and responsibilities.

rules.title: Strengthen Organizational Controls
rules.description: Improve your organizational governance around information security. Focus on supplier relationships and development security practices.

rules.title: Enhance People Security Awareness
rules.description: Invest in security awareness training and clear disciplinary processes for security violations.

rules.title: Improve Physical Security Controls
rules.description: Implement physical security measures to protect your facilities and critical infrastructure.

rules.title: Deploy Technical Security Controls
rules.description: Implement essential technical controls including access management, encryption, and monitoring.
actions: Set up security monitoring and logging

rules.title: Create Comprehensive Information Security Program
rules.description: You need a holistic information security program. Consider implementing an integrated management system.
